title: Mildly Flaky Russian Khus Khus Blini
description: A Russian-inspired blini recipe featuring khus khus and a soffritto base, perfect for meal prep. This dish is onion- and garlic-free.

ingredients.name: egg replacer (e.g., flaxseed or chia seeds)

instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine the khus khus, flour, salt, sugar, and yeast.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the egg replacer and soy milk.
Add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients and stir until a sticky dough forms.
Knead the dough for 10 minutes until it becomes smooth and elastic.
Place the dough in a greased bowl, cover it with a damp cloth, and let it rise in a warm place for 1 hour.
Preheat a non-stick pan or griddle over medium heat.
Divide the dough into 8-10 equal pieces and roll each piece into a ball.
Flatten each ball into a disk shape and cook the blini for 2-3 minutes on each side.
Brush the cooked blini with coconut oil and serve warm with your favorite toppings.
Repeat the process to make more blini as needed.
